subcodes.first_line: O thou who art bereft of all worldly possession and station, who, like 'Abdu'l-Bahá, art lost upon the path of love and wanderest amidst the realms of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بی سر و سامان عبدالبهاء گمگشته راه عشق است و تو سرگردان در عالم امکان هردو
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
